text:
(ix) The time of death or the ascendant of demise will be the
sign represented by the sum of the longitudes of the ascendant,
Nandi and the Moon.
(x) Find out the Navariisa, Dvadasariisa and decanate
occupied by Mandi. When Jupiter arrives at the Navariisa,
Saturn at the Dvadasariisa and the Sun at a trine to the decanate,
it will take place. The ascendant at death may also be the sign
occupied by the lord of the sign represented by the sum of the
longitudes of the three viz. the ascendant, the Moon and Mandi.
(xi) Death may overtake a person when the Moon in transit
passes through the following signs : —
(D The sign occupied by the lord of the 22nd decanate counted
from that of the natal Moon, or its trine; (2) the sign representing
the natal ascendant; (3) the Sth house from that; (4) the J2th
house from the ascendant: (5) the sign occupied by the sun at
birth; (6) the asterism occupied by the lord of the Sth house.
(xii) The solar month of death would be identical with the
